entries.title: New Analytics Features Added
entries.description: Added Provider Capacity map, Coverage Gap Analysis, Changelog panel, and enhanced export functionality

entries.title: Provider licensing data updated
entries.description: Updated all provider license dates and services from Provider Licensing Report

entries.title: Service availability update
entries.description: TRT: 23 states active, HRT: 11 states active, GLP: 24 states active. Added Nicole Tahira Perrotte; Removed Skye Sauls

entries.title: Missouri added to Async Tier 2
entries.description: Missouri (MO) now available for Async services at Tier 2 level

entries.title: Licensing maps added
entries.description: Added CSR Map, Provider Authority Map, State Rules Map, and CS Refills Map under Licensing tab

entries.title: Provider Authority Map with service filter
entries.description: Added ability to filter providers by service type (TRT, HRT, GLP, Async)

entries.title: Search/jump to state feature
entries.description: Added keyboard shortcut (/) to quickly search and jump to any state

entries.title: Multi-service coverage map
entries.description: Added Coverage view showing states colored by number of available services

entries.title: State comparison feature
entries.description: Added ability to compare services across multiple states side-by-side

entries.title: Dark mode support
entries.description: Added dark mode toggle with automatic theme persistence
